description: LLMem memory system — injects context at session start, extracts memories at session end, and preserves key memories during compaction.

hooks.command: llmem stats 2>/dev/null && echo '---' && llmem search proposed --type procedure --limit 5 2>/dev/null
llmem hook ending $(cat /dev/stdin | jq -r '.session_id // empty') 2>/dev/null || true
